---
title: "Path Diagrams Replication/Generalization"
editor: visual
---

## Direct Replication (Classic)

```{mermaid}
graph LR
subgraph O[Original]
  Gf[Second-order factor] --> F1[Factor 1]
  Gf --> F2[Factor 2]
  Gf --> F3[Factor 3]

  F1 --> A[Item A]
  F1 --> B[Item B]
  F1 --> C[Item C]

  F2 --> D[Item D]
  F2 --> E[Item E]
  F2 --> F[Item F]

  F3 --> G[Item G]
  F3 --> H[Item H]
  F3 --> I[Item I]
end

linkStyle 0 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 3 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;

subgraph R[Replication]
  bGf[Second-order factor] --> bF1[Factor 1]
  bGf --> bF2[Factor 2]
  bGf --> bF3[Factor 3]

  bF1 --> bA[Item A]
  bF1 --> bB[Item B]
  bF1 --> bC[Item C]

  bF2 --> bD[Item D]
  bF2 --> bE[Item E]
  bF2 --> bF[Item F]

  bF3 --> bG[Item G]
  bF3 --> bH[Item H]
  bF3 --> bI[Item I]
end

linkStyle 12 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 15 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
O ~~~ R
```

## Conceptual Replication (Classic)

```{mermaid}
graph LR
subgraph O[Original]
  Gf[Second-order factor] --> F1[Factor 1]
  Gf --> F2[Factor 2]
  Gf --> F3[Factor 3]

  F1 --> A[Item A]
  F1 --> B[Item B]
  F1 --> C[Item C]

  F2 --> D[Item D]
  F2 --> E[Item E]
  F2 --> F[Item F]

  F3 --> G[Item G]
  F3 --> H[Item H]
  F3 --> I[Item I]
end

linkStyle 0 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 3 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;

subgraph R[Replication]
  bGf[Second-order factor] --> bF1[Factor 1]
  bGf --> bF2[Factor 2]
  bGf --> bF3[Factor 3]

  bF1 --> bA[Item A]
  bF1 --> bB[Item B]
  bF1 --> bC[Item C]

  bF2 --> bD[Item D]
  bF2 --> bE[Item E]
  bF2 --> bF[Item F]

  bF3 --> bG[Item G]
  bF3 --> bH[Item H]
  bF3 --> bI[Item I]
end

linkStyle 12 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 17 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
O ~~~ R
```

## Direct Replication (SEM)

```{mermaid}
graph LR
subgraph O[Original]
  Gf[Second-order factor] --> F1[Factor 1]
  Gf --> F2[Factor 2]
  Gf --> F3[Factor 3]

  F1 --> A[Item A]
  F1 --> B[Item B]
  F1 --> C[Item C]

  F2 --> D[Item D]
  F2 --> E[Item E]
  F2 --> F[Item F]

  F3 --> G[Item G]
  F3 --> H[Item H]
  F3 --> I[Item I]
end

linkStyle 0 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 3 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 4 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 5 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;

subgraph R[Replication]
  bGf[Second-order factor] --> bF1[Factor 1]
  bGf --> bF2[Factor 2]
  bGf --> bF3[Factor 3]

  bF1 --> bA[Item A]
  bF1 --> bB[Item B]
  bF1 --> bC[Item C]

  bF2 --> bD[Item D]
  bF2 --> bE[Item E]
  bF2 --> bF[Item F]

  bF3 --> bG[Item G]
  bF3 --> bH[Item H]
  bF3 --> bI[Item I]
end

linkStyle 12 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 15 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 16 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 17 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
O ~~~ R
```

# Conceptual Replication (SEM)

```{mermaid}
graph LR
subgraph O[Original]
  Gf[Second-order factor] --> F1[Factor 1]
  Gf --> F2[Factor 2]
  Gf --> F3[Factor 3]

  F1 --> A[Item A]
  F1 --> B[Item B]
  F1 --> C[Item C]

  F2 --> D[Item D]
  F2 --> E[Item E]
  F2 --> F[Item F]

  F3 --> G[Item G]
  F3 --> H[Item H]
  F3 --> I[Item I]
end

linkStyle 0 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 3 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 4 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;


subgraph R[Replication]
  bGf[Second-order factor] --> bF1[Factor 1]
  bGf --> bF2[Factor 2]
  bGf --> bF3[Factor 3]

  bF1 --> bA[Item A]
  bF1 --> bB[Item B]
  bF1 --> bC[Item C]

  bF2 --> bD[Item D]
  bF2 --> bE[Item E]
  bF2 --> bF[Item F]

  bF3 --> bG[Item G]
  bF3 --> bH[Item H]
  bF3 --> bI[Item I]
end

linkStyle 12 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;

linkStyle 16 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 17 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
O ~~~ R
```

# Replication? (SEM)

```{mermaid}
graph LR
subgraph O[Original]
  Gf[Second-order factor] --> F1[Factor 1]
  Gf --> F2[Factor 2]
  Gf --> F3[Factor 3]

  F1 --> A[Item A]
  F1 --> B[Item B]
  F1 --> C[Item C]

  F2 --> D[Item D]
  F2 --> E[Item E]
  F2 --> F[Item F]

  F3 --> G[Item G]
  F3 --> H[Item H]
  F3 --> I[Item I]
end

linkStyle 0 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 3 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 4 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 5 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;

subgraph R[Replication]
  bGf[Second-order factor] --> bF1[Factor 1]
  bGf --> bF2[Factor 2]
  bGf --> bF3[Factor 3]

  bF1 --> bA[Item A]
  bF1 --> bB[Item B]
  bF1 --> bC[Item C]

  bF2 --> bD[Item D]
  bF2 --> bE[Item E]
  bF2 --> bF[Item F]

  bF3 --> bG[Item G]
  bF3 --> bH[Item H]
  bF3 --> bI[Item I]
end

linkStyle 12 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 18 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 19 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
linkStyle 20 stroke:#d62728,stroke-width:6px;
O ~~~ R
```
